creator: haroldp@internal.org
text:
Well, I think you are on the right track, and it certainly is a can  
of worms, but there is a bigger issue here than just mounting /proc.   
Other bugs have been reported where a sufficiently long arg-list also  
causes the process to show up differently in ps, causing rc.subr's  
process matching functions to fail.  For instance, set a very long "-- 
greylist-text".  The exact length hasn't been reliable in my tests.

     - H
